news_items.headline: Remembering the career of Gus Zernial
Rays, Caminero stay hot, sweep D-Backs: Rays 5, D-Backs 1
news_items.summary: After a rather underwhelming June in which it felt at times that the Rays were in free fall destined to repeat the 2025 season spiral, they rebounded and rattled off five consecutive wins. Now, 81 games down and eight sweeps later, they again sit atop the AL East with sole possession of the division lead […]

news_items.headline: Aaron Boone: No timetable on re-imaging Aaron Judge’s rib injury
news_items.summary: The New York Yankees remain in limbo on a date for slugger Aaron Judge to return from a fractured rib.

news_items.headline: Sinkerman
Reds’ Eugenio Suárez leaves after taking pitch to hand; X-ray inconclusive, CT scan scheduled
news_items.summary: Manager Terry Francona said Eugenio Suárez will have a CT scan after traveling with the team to Milwaukee for the start of a four-game series against the Brewers.

Featuring one of the more animated brawls we’ve seen in recent years and plenty of homers, Tacoma, despite their losing effort, provided the fans in […]

news_items.headline: Gray's no-hitter ends 8th, Red Sox complete sweep
news_items.summary: Jarren Duran singled home the winning run to cap a three-run rally in the 10th inning after Boston blew a two-run lead in the ninth, and the Red Sox finished a four-game sweep of the rival New York Yankees with a 5-4 victory Sunday night at Fenway Park.

news_items.headline: Schwarber sets Phils mark with MLB-best 30th HR
news_items.summary: Phillies slugger Kyle Schwarber became the first major leaguer to reach 30 homers this season and the fastest to do so in franchise history.

news_items.headline: AL batting leader Diaz leaves with shoulder injury...
news_items.summary: Rays designated hitter and American League-leading hitter Yandy Díaz was removed from Sunday's game against the Diamondbacks because of a strained shoulder.

news_items.headline: Rangers' Langford to IL with strained hamstring
news_items.summary: The Rangers have placed outfielder Wyatt Langford on the 10-day injured list because of a strained left hamstring and activated outfielder Evan Carter off the IL.

news_items.headline: NBC bumps Yankees-Red Sox, sticks with golf
news_items.summary: NBC preempted the Yankees-Red Sox "Sunday Night Baseball" game in favor of the Travelers Championship, which ran late after rain suspended final-round play for nearly 90 minutes.

news_items.headline: Suarez exits Reds' loss after HBP; CT scan next
news_items.summary: X-rays were inconclusive on Eugenio Suarez's left hand after he was hit by a pitch and forced to leave the Reds' 9-4 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates on Sunday, and Cincinnati manager Terry Francona said his third baseman will undergo a CT scan on Monday.
